title: Agents Are Aging Too: Agent Lifespan Engineering for Deployed Systems
abstract: Agent Lifespan Eng explores the longevity and evolution of AI agents, providing insights into their maintenance, retirement, and replacement strategies to ensure sustainable AI systems.
abstract_zh: 嘿朋友，你听过AI机器人活到500岁那种梗吗？这个Agent Lifespan Eng工具就是专门研究这些聊天机器人的寿命和进化之路的。它能告诉你怎么把那些老员工变退休、新员工接班，保证咱们的人工智能系统永远不掉链子！绝对干货！
